name: simple-weather
description: Web application that displays weather data

scripts.build: rm -rf dist; export NODE_ENV=production; webpack #this will build and write to dist
scripts.start: webpack-dev-server #this will build but live in memory

author: Eric Majerus

notesAboutDependencies.react-dom: used to attach react components to the dom
notesAboutDependencies.react-redux: provides ability to use redux with react
notesAboutDependencies.redux-thunk: provides ability to pass functions to redux for asynchronous uses
notesAboutDependencies.react-responsive: allows me to use media queries to target mobile devices
notesAboutDependencies.redux-devtools-extension: using this removes the need for custom code looking for devtools extension in the app
notesAboutDependencies.node-fetch: fetch is not native to node 8
notesAboutDependencies.serve: static server being i'm not using a standard node server
notesAboutDependencies.wt-cli: webtask.io cli for managing webtask endpoints
